name_en: 【Top Quality】M11380 Pink 👏👏 The Lisa wallet is made of Monogram canvas with a colored leather lining. This compact wallet features a Circle pull tab and corner coin pocket, making it easy to fit into small bags or clutches. It includes a bill compartment, two flat pockets, and four card slots. Dimensions 9 x 11.5 x 1.5cm. 🎁🎁
